code:
import io
import string
import list

fn is_ws(_ b: Int) -> Bool
  b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13 or b == 11 or b == 12
end

fn get_at(_ xs: List<Int>, _ i: Int) -> Int
  match list.get(xs, i)
  when Some(v)
    v
  when None
    0
  end
end

fn byte_or_space(_ s: String, _ i: Int) -> Int
  match string.byte_at(s, i)
  when Some(v)
    v
  when None
    32
  end
end

fn main() -> Unit
  let input = io.read_to_end()
  let n = string.len(input)

  mut buffer = ""
  mut starts: List<Int> = [0]
  mut lengths: List<Int> = [0]
  mut num = 0
  mut buf_len = 0
  mut token_ids: List<Int> = [0]
  mut total = 0

  mut cur_start = 0
  mut cur_len = 0
  mut in_tok = false

  mut i = 0
  while i <= n
    mut ws = true
    if i < n
      let b = byte_or_space(input, i)
      ws = is_ws(b)
    end

    if ws
      if in_tok
        let tok = string.substring(input, cur_start, cur_start + cur_len)
        mut found = 0
        mut j = 1
        while j <= num
          if found == 0
            let s = get_at(starts, j)
            let l = get_at(lengths, j)
            let existing = string.substring(buffer, s, s + l)
            if existing == tok
              found = j
            end
          end
          j = j + 1
        end

        if found == 0
          buffer = "#{buffer}#{tok}"
          starts = list.push(starts, buf_len)
          lengths = list.push(lengths, cur_len)
          buf_len = buf_len + cur_len
          num = num + 1
          token_ids = list.push(token_ids, num)
        else
          token_ids = list.push(token_ids, found)
        end
        total = total + 1

        in_tok = false
        cur_len = 0
      end
    else
      if not in_tok
        cur_start = i
        in_tok = true
      end
      cur_len = cur_len + 1
    end

    i = i + 1
  end

  mut best_id = 0
  mut best_count = 0
  mut idx = 1
  while idx <= num
    mut c = 0
    mut k = 1
    while k <= total
      if get_at(token_ids, k) == idx
        c = c + 1
      end
      k = k + 1
    end
    if c > best_count
      best_count = c
      best_id = idx
    end
    idx = idx + 1
  end

  if best_id > 0
    let s = get_at(starts, best_id)
    let l = get_at(lengths, best_id)
    let tok = string.substring(buffer, s, s + l)
    println("top=#{tok}=#{best_count}")
  end
end
